label: Transparent Oarfish motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Oarfish transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated oarfish ribbon motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A full-body oarfish with long silver ribbon-like body, iridescent metallic scales, small deep-ocean eye, red crest and red dorsal fin rays flowing along the back, delicate red pelvic fin streamers, accurate slender anatomy, crisp silhouette edges, and natural deep-sea fish texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full vertical ribbon body in a graceful S-curve without cropping, no second fish.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves silver body highlights, red fins, dark blue reflected shadows, and fine scale texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no bubbles, no ocean background, no floor plane, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no second subject.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Oarfish" / "Oarfish Ribbon", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Reference use: Use the visible oarfish cutout as the source motif. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the silver ribbon body, red crest and fins, dark blue deep-ocean shadows, and iridescent scale texture.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 style, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Resolution and legibility: Use large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text. Labels should be short and clear.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Oarfish", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, vertical timeline system, dashboard/data charts, forms, data table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
UI content emphasis: vertical timeline/data UI inspired by the oarfish ribbon. Include a left vertical navigation rail, central vertical timeline with dated event rows and red fin markers, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, progress chart, status badges, readable table rows, form fields, tabs, switches, checkboxes, buttons, alerts, empty/loading/error states, search command panel.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; choose font guidance that works for multilingual product UI.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, refined operational dashboard, not a marketing page.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals: pearl white, scale silver, mist blue, abyss navy, pelagic blue, red fin, coral red, ink blue, foam gray.
Visual details: ribbon-like vertical dividers, fine scale stipple texture, red fin tick marks, silver surface cards, dark blue depth lines, crisp data density.
Text: use short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no misspellings, no ocean photo background, no decorative stock art.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Oarfish" / "Oarfish Ribbon". It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible oarfish motif and the visible light design-system board as references. Preserve the silver body, red fins, abyss navy, pelagic blue, pearl highlights, fine scale texture, vertical timeline system, left navigation rail, cards, charts, forms, table, status states, and shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 style, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Resolution and legibility: Use large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text. Labels should be short and clear.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Oarfish", label "Dark Mode", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, vertical timeline system, dashboard/data charts, forms, data table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
UI content emphasis: dark vertical timeline/data UI inspired by the oarfish ribbon. Include a left vertical navigation rail, central vertical timeline with dated event rows and red fin markers, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, progress chart, status badges, readable table rows, form fields, tabs, switches, checkboxes, buttons, alerts, empty/loading/error states, search command panel.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; choose font guidance that works for multilingual product UI.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, refined operational dashboard, not a marketing page.
Color palette: dark background from abyss navy and ink blue, foreground from pearl white and scale silver, muted from deep pelagic blue, primary red fin/coral red, accent mist blue and silver highlights. Use restrained contrast and subtle motif texture overlays.
Visual details: ribbon-like vertical dividers, fine scale stipple texture, red fin tick marks, dark blue depth lines, silver data highlights, crisp data density.
Text: use short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no misspellings, no ocean photo background, no decorative stock art.
